checks.name: Protected routes use RequireAuth wrappers
checks.detail: Navigation safety must come from route wrappers, not page-local redirects.

checks.name: Dashboard internal navigation uses Link
checks.detail: Internal route transitions should avoid full page reload.

checks.name: AppShell nav uses router links
checks.detail: Navbar routing should remain client-side and consistent.

checks.name: Runtime CTRL+F5 persistence
